text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've been carefully preparing for the Arima
Kinen, and Seiun Sky's hard work has been paying
off. One day...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is it all right if I show up late to practice
today?
choice_data_list: You're going to ask permission to play hooky?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Tch, it's not like I'm skipping. What a bad joke.
choice_data_list: Sorry. Why are you going to be late?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Actually... Gramps is coming to campus today.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
He was going on about how bad he wanted to
visit, even if it's just for a little, so...
SKY!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Who's—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wait, Gramps?! Why are you so early?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sky's grandfather bursts into my office with a
hearty laugh and a ton of baskets in his arms.

text_block_list.name: Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Hah-hahaa! I knew you'd never introduce me to
your trainer otherwise!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Egh, you know me too well!

text_block_list.name: Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Nice to meet ya! I'm Sky's grandpa. Thanks for
taking good care of her!

text_block_list.name: Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Hahaah! I like the look in your eyes! Sky must be
happy as a clam to have you watching over her.
C'mere, you!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: G-Gramps! Wait a—erf.

text_block_list.name: Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
My precious little Sky! The greatest grandkid in
the world, you are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
He pulls her in for a hug and immediately starts
tousling her hair.

text_block_list.name: Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, I brought gifts! Picked 'em all myself
from the farm. I got all your favorites, Sky.

text_block_list.name: Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: I'm glad you're well! Keep it up now, ya hear?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Exactly! He's a walking thundercloud! He's wild, can't sit still, and—to put a cherry on top—he's loud.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And not an ounce of decorum. That's why I didn't
want you two to meet...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
E-enough about Gramps! Let's start training
already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, more visitors stop by during our break.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hi there, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: We've brought you something to drink.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, you two! That's awful nice!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you busy though? I'd think you'd have a lot
on your plate with the Arima Kinen coming up.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It's fine! Actually, I feel—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe, don't fall for her usual traps.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Tch, so you're not gonna fess up? That's fine
either way.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...I take it you are in perfect form?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
If I said I wasn't, would you cut me some slack?
Heehee!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. If that were the case, I would gladly
triumph over you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa... I knew you were heartless!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But I totally believe you're doing a good job, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you're gonna go all out in this year's final
big race. That's why I'm working hard too!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'll be waiting for you at Nakayama Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Those two think way too highly of me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hm... For some reason, that doesn't sound like a
good thing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now then, shall we go back to training or... we
could end early and get something to eat?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the encouragement of both her rivals and
her grandfather, today adds fuel to the fire as we
prepare for the Arima Kinen.
